full_details:
HITCHES
(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:
- 9000 – XD Hitch (DOUBLE)*

Adaptor Needed:
- 9114 – XD Multi-Awn Adaptor (DOUBLE)

*NOTE: will also work with the triple version.
BRACKETS
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

SUPPLIED BRACKETS FROM 30SECOND® WILL WORK WITH THE XD HITCH RANGE.

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9100 – XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9104 – XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9102 – XD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9106 – XD Side Twist Bracket Long Foot (DOUBLE)*

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.

(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:
- 9000 – XD Hitch (DOUBLE)*

Adaptor Needed:
- 9130 – XD Alu-Cab Quick Pitch Awning Adaptor (DOUBLE)

BRACKETS
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

ADAPTOR WILL ENABLE THE XD HITCH TO FIT TO ALU-CAB® BRACKETS.

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9100 – XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9104 – XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9102 – XD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9106 – XD Side Twist Bracket Long Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR FOR ARB® BASE RACK®:

- 9133 – XD Side Twist Bracket for ARB® Base Rack® (TRIPLE)

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.

WALL MOUNTS
(OPTIONAL)

Benefits: Allows you to remove your roof rack accessory from your vehicle so that it can be fixed to a wall when not in use.

SECURED LOCATION (e.g. locked garages, workshop walls):
- 9010 – XD Wall Mounts+

UNSECURED LOCATION (e.g. open carports, public or shared garage areas):
- 9011 – XD Lockable Wall Mounts+

+NOTE: You cannot use Wall Mounts to mount anything to the vehicle – these are for static wall use ONLY.

brackets_section_raw:
NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

- KS0375 – KAON® Universal Awning Bracket to suit ARB BASE Rack (2 brackets) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- KS0454 – KAON® Universal Awning Bracket to suit ARB BASE Rack (3 brackets) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- KS0413 – KAON® Universal 270 Degree Awning Bracket Set to suit ARB BASE Rack For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

BRACKETS NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

- KS0375 – KAON® Universal Awning Bracket to suit ARB BASE Rack (2 brackets) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- KS0454 – KAON® Universal Awning Bracket to suit ARB BASE Rack (3 brackets) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- KS0413 – KAON® Universal 270 Degree Awning Bracket Set to suit ARB BASE Rack For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.

full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

BRACKETS NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

- 8300 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch. (FITS FROM UNDERNEATH THE ROOF RACK OR REQUIRES A 					12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 8301 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.(FITS FROM UNDERNEATH THE ROOF RACK OR REQUIRES A 					12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY).
- 8304 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 8305 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 9100 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 9101 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 9104 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)
- 9105 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch. (ALSO REQUIRES A 12MM THICK PACKER PER BRACKET (SOLD SEPARATELY.)

full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

BRACKETS NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:
- 8159 – HD Hitch Standard* 

*NOTE: will also work with the triple version.

BRACKETS
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

SUPPLIED BRACKETS FROM OCAM® REQUIRE 1 X 8.5MM HOLE TO BE DRILLED PER BRACKET TO ACHIEVE 2 BRACKET HOLES AT 42MM CENTRES FOR THE HD HITCH RANGE.

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 8300 – HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 8304 – HD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 8300 – HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 8306 – HD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.

WALL MOUNTS
(OPTIONAL)

Benefits: Allows you to remove your roof rack accessory from your vehicle so that it can be fixed to a wall when not in use.

SECURED LOCATION (e.g. locked garages, workshop walls):
- 8160 – HD Wall Mounts+

UNSECURED LOCATION (e.g. open carports, public or shared garage areas):
- 8161 – HD Lockable Wall Mounts+

+NOTE: You cannot use Wall Mounts to mount anything to the vehicle – these are for static wall use ONLY.

full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

- 8300 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8301 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8304 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8305 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 9100 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9101 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9104 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9105 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

BRACKETS NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

- 8300 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8301 – RacksBrax® HD L50 L Brackets (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8304 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 8305 – RacksBrax® HD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For HD Hitch.
- 9100 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9101 – RacksBrax® XD Adjustable Brackets Short (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9104 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. For XD Hitch.
- 9105 – RacksBrax® XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (TRIPLE) For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. For XD Hitch.

Mounting Points:			2

brackets_section_raw:
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9100 – XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9104 – XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9102 – XD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9106 – XD Side Twist Bracket Long Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR FOR ARB® BASE RACK®:

- 9133 – XD Side Twist Bracket for ARB® Base Rack® (TRIPLE)

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.
wall_mounts_section_raw:
(OPTIONAL)

Benefits: Allows you to remove your roof rack accessory from your vehicle so that it can be fixed to a wall when not in use.

SECURED LOCATION (e.g. locked garages, workshop walls):
- 9010 – XD Wall Mounts+

UNSECURED LOCATION (e.g. open carports, public or shared garage areas):
- 9011 – XD Lockable Wall Mounts+

+NOTE: You cannot use Wall Mounts to mount anything to the vehicle – these are for static wall use ONLY.

hitches_section_raw:
(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:

Adaptor Needed:
- 9114 – XD Multi-Awn Adaptor (DOUBLE)

*NOTE: will also work with the triple version.
brackets_section_raw:
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

SUPPLIED BRACKETS FROM RUGGED 4X4® WILL WORK WITH THE XD HITCH RANGE.

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9100 – XD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9104 – XD Side Twist Bracket Short Foot (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 9102 – XD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 9106 – XD Side Twist Bracket Long Foot (DOUBLE)*

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.
wall_mounts_section_raw:
(OPTIONAL)

Benefits: Allows you to remove your roof rack accessory from your vehicle so that it can be fixed to a wall when not in use.

SECURED LOCATION (e.g. locked garages, workshop walls):
- 9010 – XD Wall Mounts+

UNSECURED LOCATION (e.g. open carports, public or shared garage areas):
- 9011 – XD Lockable Wall Mounts+

+NOTE: You cannot use Wall Mounts to mount anything to the vehicle – these are for static wall use ONLY.

brackets_section_raw:
NEEDED FOR RACKSBRAX QUICK RELEASE HITCH SYSTEMS

- TLRFTAM – Tracklander® Flat Top Awning Mount (Pair) For awnings or accessories that require 2 mounting points. Suited for HD Hitch or XD Hitch. NOTE: only rated to 10kg per bracket.
- TLRFTAM3 – Tracklander® Flat Top Awning Mount (Triple)  For awnings or accessories that require 3 mounting points. Suited for HD Hitch or XD Hitch. NOTE: only rated to 10kg per bracket.
full_details:
A FEW THINGS TO NOTE…

- Brackets are fitted on top of roof rack unless otherwise noted;
- Often brackets supplied by accessory manufacturers will fit the RacksBrax quick release HD and XD Hitches;
- All RacksBrax brackets with an HD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release HD Hitches; and
- All RacksBrax brackets with an XD prefix in the name fit only the RacksBrax quick release XD Hitches.

hitches_section_raw:
(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:
- 8159 – HD Hitch Standard AND
- 8210 – HD Accessory Plate Gen 2; OR
Use where brackets cannot be located at 890mm centres, the distance between the centres of the recovery board mounting points. this is typical of roof rack bars or platform racks with slats/bars that run TRANSVERSE (across the width of the vehicle);
- 8173 – HD Accessory Bars
Use where brackets can be located at 890mm centres (typically for platform racks with slats that run LONGITUDINAL (along the length of the vehicle).

(Required Minimum For FAST ON, FAST OFF!)

Mounting Points:			2

Hitches Needed:
- 8159 – HD Hitch Standard* 

*NOTE: will also work with the triple version.
BRACKETS
(OPTIONAL)

Mounting Points: 		2

SUPPLIED BRACKETS FROM YAKIMA® WILL WORK WITH THE HD HITCH RANGE.

Brackets Needed:

FOR BARS OR PLATFORM STYLES WITH TRANSVERSE SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 8300 – HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 8304 – HD Adjustable Brackets Short (DOUBLE)*

FOR PLATFORM STYLES WITH LONGITUDINAL SLATS (WITH NO PERIMETER LIP):

- 8300 – HD L50 L Brackets (DOUBLE)*; OR
- 8306 – HD Adjustable Brackets Long (DOUBLE)*

*Roof racks with perimeter lips require packers to fit RacksBrax brackets (sold separately). Refer to roof rack guide for more information on racks with perimeter lips.

WALL MOUNTS
(OPTIONAL)

Benefits: Allows you to remove your roof rack accessory from your vehicle so that it can be fixed to a wall when not in use.

SECURED LOCATION (e.g. locked garages, workshop walls):
- 8160 – HD Wall Mounts+

UNSECURED LOCATION (e.g. open carports, public or shared garage areas):
- 8161 – HD Lockable Wall Mounts+

+NOTE: You cannot use Wall Mounts to mount anything to the vehicle – these are for static wall use ONLY.
Sadly not compatible :(
